pizzelle's donut shop rarely, if ever, gets customers, but she always makes enough to feed a dozen people every day just in case she happens to get a sudden influx. she has no one to give her extra supply to, and if they aren't eaten soon, they'll spoil. but she also doesn't want to throw away so many, perfectly fine donuts, so she resorts to a third option; eating all of them herself, becoming incredibly and attractively overweight in doing so.
